mapper.insert: insert into batch.resource_queue ( tenant_id, queue_code, queue_name, queue_type, max_running_jobs, max_running_partitions, max_qps, worker_group, resource_tag, priority_policy, fair_share_weight, enabled, description ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{queueCode}, #{queueName}, #{queueType}, #{maxRunningJobs}0, #{maxRunningPartitions}0, #{maxQps}0, #{workerGroup}, #{resourceTag}, #{priorityPolicy}'FIFO', #{fairShareWeight}1, #{enabled}true, #{description} ) on conflict (tenant_id, queue_code) do update set queue_name = excluded.queue_name, queue_type = excluded.queue_type, max_running_jobs = excluded.max_running_jobs, max_running_partitions = excluded.max_running_partitions, max_qps = excluded.max_qps, worker_group = excluded.worker_group, resource_tag = excluded.resource_tag, priority_policy = excluded.priority_policy, fair_share_weight = excluded.fair_share_weight, enabled = excluded.enabled, description = excluded.description, updated_at = current_timestamp

insert into batch.resource_queue ( tenant_id, queue_code, queue_name, queue_type, max_running_jobs, max_running_partitions, max_qps, worker_group, resource_tag, priority_policy, fair_share_weight, enabled, description ) values ( #{tenant_id}, #{queue_code}, #{queue_name}, #{queue_type}, #{max_running_jobs}0, #{max_running_partitions}0, #{max_qps}0, #{worker_group}, #{resource_tag}, #{priority_policy}'FIFO', #{fair_share_weight}1, #{enabled}true, #{description} )
mapper.update: update batch.resource_queue set queue_name = #{queue_name}, queue_type = #{queue_type}, max_running_jobs = #{max_running_jobs}, max_running_partitions = #{max_running_partitions}, max_qps = #{max_qps}, worker_group = #{worker_group}, resource_tag = #{resource_tag}, priority_policy = #{priority_policy}, fair_share_weight = #{fair_share_weight}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenant_id} and id = #{id}
